name: The Way Home
short_description: The protagonist is on his way home from work. However, something is strange about his "The Way Home" today...
detailed_description:
The protagonist is on his way home from work.
However, something is strange about his "The Way Home" today...

Game Contents

On today's journey home, various dangers await the player.
Avoid these dangers and make it to your beloved home.

You can investigate only one path and proceed if it looks safe, or if you want to investigate more thoroughly, you can investigate the other path as well.
The final goal is to repeat this process and reach your beloved home.

Gameplay Video/Distribution Guidelines

You can publish and distribute gameplay videos without permission.
No credit is required.

The developer takes no responsibility for any damages caused by publishing or distributing gameplay videos of this game.
These guidelines are subject to change.
